content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: The Electric Chair
description: The Electric Chair is an Effervescent grenade mod made by Vladof, introduced in the Fight for Sanctuary DLC.
notes: Uranus has a 10% chance to drop The Electric Chair. Its behaviour is a stronger take on Storm Front, swapping in child grenades that leave a long shock trail as they move.

special.description: On impact, it triggers a shock blast, then fires 8 lightning bolts upward, each dealing 45% of the grenade damage. It also scatters 8 sticky child grenades around the landing point; they arc outward, zap nearby enemies like Tesla grenades, then detonate when their duration ends with a smaller radius than the initial blast.
special.title: The truth is often one's best shield.
